name: full_no_proof_deploy
description: High-level symbiotic no-proof production deploy orchestrator. Uses the no-proof-deployer podman MCP (localhost/no-proof-deployer:latest) + forged no_proof_deployer_helper + godaddy-mcp/vercel_helper/taskmaster for full real-API deploys: domain connect (GoDaddy DNS), Vercel/Neon deploy, no-proof verification. Minimal input via compact {name; param} style or /task wrapper. References podman MCPs registered in ~/.grok/config.toml. Real execution only; chains to add_podman_mcp patterns, forge outputs, and existing connect_domain/production_domain_connect TASKs.

domain.description: Target domain e.g. 'example.com' for DNS + deploy

vercel_project.description: Vercel project name or id for deploy target

neon_project.description: Neon DB project for backend if needed

dns_records.description: Optional DNS records to set via GoDaddy (e.g. [{type:'A', name:'@', data:'1.2.3.4'}])

deploy_path.description: Local or git path for artifact to deploy (defaults to current context)

non_interactive.description: Skip prompts, use provided params + defaults for full automation. Default true.

steps.description: Confirm via config + search_tool that no_proof_deployer_helper, vercel_helper, godaddy (and taskmaster) podman MCPs are registered and tools available (e.g. no_proof_deployer_helper__execute_action, godaddy__* ). Use podman images to assert images present.

Chain to production_domain_connect.task.json or connect_domain patterns: use godaddy-mcp podman for DNS setup if dns_records or default apex/CNAME for vercel deploy. Call real godaddy tools via use_tool after search.

Use podman MCP for no-proof-deployer (or its helper): run real deploy sequence for vercel + godaddy verification + neon if provided. Pass domain/vercel_project etc. Execute via /home/nicsins/workdir/bin/task or direct use_tool on registered mcp. Capture logs for no-proof (no manual proof needed).
Post-deploy: query godaddy for DNS propagation, vercel for deployment status, taskmaster for logging. Emit/update TASK or GitHub/Linear record. Use no_proof_deployer_helper for verification steps.
If success: use publish_connector_to_github if new assets, track_in_linear_and_github or issue_write on nicsins/grok-super-taskmaster. Update SWARM_STATUS.md via push_files.

ties_to: no-proof-deployer (podman build verified), connector_forge no_proof_deployer_helper (image+config+TASK), add_podman_mcp, production_domain_connect.task.json, connect_domain, godaddy-mcp, vercel_helper-mcp, taskmaster-mcp, /task wrapper, ~/.grok/config.toml podman sections
symbiotic: Complements forge_and_wire_mcp, execute_symbiotic_task, register_podman_mcp. Enables 'one compact command for full live deploy + DNS + no-proof' vision. Podman isolated for security. Chains with existing TaskMaster /task high-level minimal input.
